THE COURT FINDS THAT THE SETTLEMENT HAS NOW BEEN MODIFIED AND IS SATISFACTORY SUBJECT TO CLASS NOTICE AND AN OPPORTUNITY TO OBJECT BY CLASS MEMBERS AND ALL FINAL PAPERS BEING SUBMITTED AND ANY FINAL DETERMINATION WOULD BE MADE IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE SCHEDULE PROVIDED FOR FINAL HEARING. THIS WOULD INCLUDE FINAL DETERMINATION AND IF ATTORNEY'S FEE ARE REASONABLE WHICH THE COURT IS NOT MAKING AT THIS TIME. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
